claim: Benchmark scenarios provide known latent state mixtures for recovery evaluation.
State-weight and dominant-state recovery are quantified against known truth, including the VI posterior mean.
Mixed-state entropy preservation is summarized as absolute error against true latent entropy.
Rare transition-like cells are evaluated using simulator truth labels, with entropy used only as a detection score.
Initializer, NB-optimized, and VI-backed state-gene programs are evaluated against true marker assignments.
